acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-embedded SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for sig-embedded is working on providing openEuler Embedded covering infrastructure, key components etc... The SIG has 19 core members and maintains 48 repositories in the Embedded and IoT domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-embedded SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-embedded SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at NA; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-embedded SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-embedded SIG maintains 48 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-embedded.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-embedded SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-embedded SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: Wayne Ren, Xinyu Li, Linxu Fang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
